hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: 15 Years of Luxury Excellence in Dubai

introduction.title: Welcome to Rolls-Royce Dubai
introduction.p1: Since 2009, Rolls-Royce Dubai has been the epitome of luxury car rental in the United Arab Emirates. We don't just rent cars; we deliver experiences that embody the spirit of Rolls-Royce – unparalleled luxury, exceptional service, and attention to every detail.
introduction.p2: From a modest beginning with three vehicles, we've grown to become Dubai's most trusted name in luxury transportation, serving royalty, celebrities, business leaders, and discerning travelers from around the world.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: We maintain the highest standards in vehicle maintenance and service delivery

milestones.2016: Became official partner for Dubai luxury hotels
milestones.2021: Introduced contactless booking and digital services

hero.subtitle: The ultimate comparison between two titans of British luxury motoring

rollsRoyce.tagline: The pinnacle of unparalleled luxury and comfort.

bentley.tagline: A perfect blend of performance and luxury.

rolls-royce.title: The Pinnacle of Luxury
points: Uncompromising commitment to luxury and comfort
The quietest and smoothest ride in the automotive world
Preferred choice of royalty and heads of state
rolls-royce.summary: Rolls-Royce represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive luxury, where no compromise is made in the pursuit of perfection.

bentley.title: Performance Luxury
bentley.summary: Bentley offers a unique blend of luxury and performance, appealing to those who want to drive as much as be driven.

rolls-royce.title: Unparalleled Opulence
points: Hand-stitched leather from specially reared bulls
Real wood veneers from single trees for perfect matching
Starlight headliner with thousands of fiber optic lights
rolls-royce.summary: Every Rolls-Royce is a masterpiece of craftsmanship, with attention to detail that borders on obsession.

bentley.title: Contemporary Luxury
bentley.summary: Bentley combines traditional craftsmanship with modern luxury, creating an environment that's both opulent and sporting.

rolls-royce.title: Effortless Power
points: Focus on refinement over outright speed
rolls-royce.summary: Rolls-Royce prioritizes smooth, effortless power delivery over sporting performance, creating a serene driving experience.

bentley.title: Exhilarating Performance
points: W12 and V8 engines with massive power
bentley.summary: Bentley delivers supercar performance wrapped in luxury, appealing to enthusiasts who refuse to compromise.

rolls-royce.title: Invisible Technology
points: Bespoke audio system tuned to each car
rolls-royce.summary: Rolls-Royce integrates cutting-edge technology seamlessly, maintaining a classic, uncluttered aesthetic.

bentley.title: Modern Innovation
bentley.summary: Bentley embraces modern technology more openly, offering a blend of traditional luxury and contemporary innovation.

rolls-royce.title: 120 Years of Excellence
points: Founded in 1904 by Henry Royce and Charles Rolls
Spirit of Ecstasy - the most famous automotive mascot
The best car in the world philosophy
rolls-royce.summary: Rolls-Royce has maintained its position as the ultimate luxury car manufacturer for over a century.

bentley.title: Racing Pedigree
points: Five Le Mans victories in the 1920s
Modern racing success at Le Mans
bentley.summary: Bentley's racing heritage infuses every model with a sporting spirit that sets it apart from pure luxury brands.

rolls-royce.title: Ultimate Investment
points: Bespoke options can double the base price
rolls-royce.summary: Rolls-Royce commands premium prices that reflect its position as the ultimate luxury automobile.

bentley.title: Accessible Ultra-Luxury
points: More accessible entry point to ultra-luxury
Wider model range and price points
bentley.summary: Bentley offers a more accessible entry into the ultra-luxury segment while maintaining exclusivity.

rollsRoyce.title: Choose Rolls-Royce If You:
rollsRoyce.point1: Value ultimate luxury and comfort above all else
rollsRoyce.point2: Want to make the strongest possible impression
rollsRoyce.point3: Prefer a serene, refined driving experience
rollsRoyce.point5: Need the ultimate wedding or special event vehicle

bentley.title: Choose Bentley If You:
bentley.point5: Like the combination of luxury and speed

verdict.title: The Verdict
verdict.p1: Both Rolls-Royce and Bentley represent the pinnacle of British luxury motoring, but they cater to different preferences. Rolls-Royce remains the ultimate choice for those seeking uncompromising luxury, refinement, and prestige. Bentley offers a compelling alternative for those who want luxury with a sporting edge.
verdict.p2: In Dubai, where luxury is a lifestyle, Rolls-Royce continues to reign supreme as the ultimate status symbol.
